ambiances.description: relaxing: effortless calm, passive ease, tension dissolved, gentle unwinding
ambiances.notes: ease, tension release — passive, not active recovery

ambiances.description: inviting: warm welcome, hospitable threshold, draws you in, encourages approach
ambiances.notes: welcoming pull — threshold quality, not interior energy

ambiances.description: fun: playful laughter, light-hearted games, humour and jokes, joyful silliness
ambiances.notes: playful, jovial — humour and games, distinct from visual intensity

ambiances.description: somber: heavy atmospheric gravity, serious restraint, subdued weight, muted solemnity
ambiances.notes: atmospheric heaviness — not emotional sadness, not institutional formality

ambiances.description: spooky: eerie uncanny dread, unsettling shadow, nervous fear, supernatural unease
ambiances.notes: uncanny, unsettling — fear and dread, distinct from theatrical drama

ambiances.description: formal: strict institutional order, ceremonial hierarchy, regulated protocol, rigid structure
ambiances.notes: institutional ceremony and order — protocol and rank, not just seriousness

ambiances.description: lively: animated social bustle, collective noise and movement, crowd interaction, spirited gathering
ambiances.notes: social animation and collective energy — crowd and noise, not colour

ambiances.description: intimate: close personal scale, private tenderness, soft vulnerability, quiet one-on-one warmth
ambiances.notes: personal closeness and private warmth — small scale

ambiances.description: sterile: clinical antiseptic neutrality, uniform bleached surfaces, absence of personal touch, medical cleanliness
ambiances.notes: clinical and antiseptic — absence of life and ornament

ambiances.description: restorative: gentle active healing, gradual recovery, soft therapeutic repair, wellness renewal
ambiances.notes: active gentle recovery — healing process, distinct from passive relaxation

ambiances.description: playful: childlike wonder, open-ended discovery, whimsical invention, innocent exploration
ambiances.notes: childlike and whimsical — wonder and discovery, not adult humour

ambiances.description: focused: concentrated mental effort, deep task attention, productive clarity, distraction-free immersion
ambiances.notes: cognitive concentration — task immersion, not institutional order

ambiances.description: melancholic: wistful bittersweet longing, quiet personal sadness, reflective inner sorrow, nostalgic grief
ambiances.notes: emotional inner sadness — personal grief and longing, not atmospheric heaviness

ambiances.description: vibrant: visually intense saturated colour, bold strong presence, vivid striking sensation, high sensory energy
ambiances.notes: visual and sensory intensity — colour and bold contrast, not social energy

ambiances.description: sacred: reverential spiritual stillness, transcendent awe, solemn elevation, holy contemplative silence
ambiances.notes: spiritual and reverential — transcendence and awe, distinct from formal ceremony

ambiances.description: raw: gritty rough unfinished surfaces, crude industrial texture, exposed pipes and scaffolding, construction debris, unrefined bruteness
ambiances.notes: gritty industrial materiality — crude and rough, not minimalist or refined

ambiances.description: opulent: luxurious excess and richness, sumptuous ornamentation, lavish abundance, extravagant sensory indulgence
ambiances.notes: luxurious and abundant — excess and richness, distinct from formal or warm

ambiances.description: serene: profound undisturbed stillness, quiet composure, untroubled peace, deep calm beyond tension
ambiances.notes: active profound stillness — deep peace, distinct from mere relaxation

ambiances.description: dramatic: theatrical tension and contrast, bold staging, powerful visual narrative, intense emotional atmosphere
ambiances.notes: theatrical staging and bold contrast — narrative tension, not fear or darkness

ambiances.description: nostalgic: layered accumulated history, familiar past memory, patina of time, warm recollection of the gone
ambiances.notes: memory and historical patina — time and the past, not sadness
